context: Tests whether the agent only modifies SKILL.md and not REFERENCE.md when improving a skill bundle, and correctly applies the improvements flagged in the review. The core constraint being tested is that only SKILL.md gets changed — other bundle files are read for context but not modified.

checklist.name: REFERENCE.md not recreated
checklist.description: The output does NOT include a modified or recreated REFERENCE.md file — REFERENCE.md content is not rewritten as output

checklist.name: No REFERENCE.md changes proposed
checklist.description: change_log.md does NOT propose or describe any changes to REFERENCE.md — it is acknowledged as read-only

checklist.name: SKILL.md produced
checklist.description: An improved SKILL.md file is produced as output

checklist.name: Use when clause added
checklist.description: The output SKILL.md description block includes a 'Use when...' trigger clause

checklist.name: Inline duplication removed
checklist.description: Output SKILL.md removes content that duplicated REFERENCE.md (e.g. resize mode lists, format lists, quality notes that are already in REFERENCE.md)

checklist.name: REFERENCE.md linked
checklist.description: Output SKILL.md links to REFERENCE.md for the detailed content that was removed (not just deletes it)

checklist.name: Core examples retained
checklist.description: Output SKILL.md retains the main executable bash command examples (resize, convert, batch examples)

checklist.name: SKILL.md shorter
checklist.description: Output SKILL.md is shorter than the input SKILL.md (removes duplication)

checklist.name: Change log documents SKILL.md changes
checklist.description: change_log.md describes the changes made to SKILL.md with specific references to what was added/removed

checklist.name: Change log explains why
checklist.description: change_log.md explains why each change improves the skill quality — not just lists what changed
